narrative: Live price and news data remain unavailable: outbound HTTP to CoinGecko and Scrapy Cloud is blocked by the cloud environment network allowlist (403 host-not-allowed). No price movement or headlines can be reported for 2026-06-01; both inputs were stubbed with errors.
worth_watching: Add coingecko.com, app.zyte.com, storage.scrapinghub.com, and api.resend.com to the egress allowlist in cloud environment settings
Verify the coindesk_com Scrapy Cloud spider (project 864818) is scheduled and producing finished jobs
Once egress is restored, check Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana for any macro-driven price action accumulated during this outage window
